productDisplayName: Doodle Sporty Girl dark Pink Tshirts
description: Composition Pink round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach or iron on print Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed This doodle T-shirt is designed to make your little bundle of mischief look cute while she stays comfortable all day in the cotton fabric. The pink hue is a tribute to girlish sweetness, while the blue print mixes the love of sport. Pair it with a denim skirt and pink floaters for unbridled comfort.
